title: Surgeon Vacancy at Granules India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Granules India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Granules India in Bhopal offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Granules India:
Granules India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Granules India!
